seoTitle: Transfer TurboTax Documents to Desktop Home & Business on Mac
metaDescription: Moving your tax data from TurboTax Online to TurboTax Desktop Home & Business on macOS? Here's how to transfer your documents smoothly.
intro: Switching from one version of TurboTax to another shouldn't mean starting your return from scratch. This guide walks through transferring your TurboTax documents into TurboTax Desktop Home & Business on macOS, so your tax information carries over without extra manual re-entry.

steps.heading: Understand why you'd transfer documents
steps.body: Moving to TurboTax Desktop Home & Business on macOS can make sense if you need more advanced business filing features than the online version offers.

steps.heading: Follow the step-by-step transfer method
steps.body: Work through the guided process for migrating your existing TurboTax files so your tax data moves over accurately.

steps.heading: Watch for common transfer issues
steps.body: Be aware of the typical problems that can come up during the migration, and how to avoid them so your data stays intact.

steps.heading: Confirm your information landed correctly
steps.body: After the transfer, check that your figures and documents appear as expected inside TurboTax Desktop before continuing your return.

steps.heading: Keep your workflow efficient going forward
steps.body: Once your documents are transferred, you can take advantage of TurboTax Desktop Home & Business's tools for ongoing accuracy and compliance.

faq.question: Can I transfer my TurboTax Online data to the Desktop version on a Mac?
faq.answer: Yes, this process covers exactly that: moving your existing TurboTax documents into TurboTax Desktop Home & Business on macOS.

faq.question: Will I lose any information during the transfer?
faq.answer: The video highlights common issues that can occur during transfer and how to avoid them, so following the steps closely helps prevent data loss.

faq.question: Why would I switch to TurboTax Desktop Home & Business instead of staying online?
faq.answer: Small business owners and professionals often move to the desktop Home & Business edition for more robust business tax filing capabilities.

faq.question: Is this transfer process macOS-specific?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial specifically addresses transferring documents into the macOS version of TurboTax Desktop Home & Business.
